l2_sentences: The cat, which was sleeping on the couch, suddenly woke up.
The book, which I borrowed from the library, needs to be returned.
The children, who were playing in the park, ran home when it started to rain.
The car, which had been parked illegally, was towed away.
The teacher, who had been explaining the concept, asked if there were any questions.
